ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_disease_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-disease association */,
  "gene_nodeId" INTEGER /* Identifier for the gene node in the network */,
  "disease_nodeId" INTEGER /* Identifier for the disease node in the network */,
  "dot_product" REAL /* Score representing the strength of the association */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene in the genes table */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease in the diseases table */,
  "source_dataset" TEXT /* The dataset or study from which the association data was derived */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* The date when the association was published or discovered */,
  "conflict_flag" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if there are conflicting data or studies regarding the association */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the confidence level of the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_disease_associations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_disease_associations_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* The standardized symbol for the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* The start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* The end position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* The strand on which the gene is located (positive or negative) */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* The type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the gene information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "disease_code" TEXT /* A standardized code for the disease (e.g., ICD-10 code) */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* The type of disease (e.g., genetic, infectious) */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* The prevalence of the disease */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date when the disease information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_network" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node in the network */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene in the genes table */,
  "connected_nodes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of node IDs that the gene is connected to */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* The type of interaction between connected genes (e.g., regulatory, physical) */,
  "interaction_strength" REAL /* A score indicating the strength of the interaction */,
  "interaction_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the interaction (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_network_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_network" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node in the network */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disease in the diseases table */,
  "connected_nodes" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of node IDs that the disease is connected to */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* The type of association between connected diseases (e.g., comorbid, causative) */,
  "association_strength" REAL /* A score indicating the strength of the association */,
  "association_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the association (e.g., clinical, epidemiological) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_network_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the association */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene-disease association being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the association was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES gene_disease_associations ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene update */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the update (e.g., new study, database) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_updates_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease update */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease being updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the update (e.g., new study, database) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_updates_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disease_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "association_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association update */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene-disease association being updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the update (e.g., new study, database) */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the update (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_updates_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES gene_disease_associations ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "module" TEXT /* The module or feature to which the permission applies */,
  "actions" TEXT /* The specific actions allowed by the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission associated with the user */,
  "module" TEXT /* The module or feature to which the permission applies */,
  "actions" TEXT /* The specific actions allowed by the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
